subcodes.first_line: Thy petition hath attained unto the hearing of the Lord of Names. Well is it with the tongue that speaketh in remembrance of the Peerless Friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات باصغاء مالک اسماء فائز نیکو است لسانیکه بذکر دوست یکتا ناطق شد و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
